constraint_note: Gemma 2 2B model is gated (HF auth required). Cannot run activation-based Chanin metric directly. Proxy labels used for AUROC validation throughout pilot. RAVEL probes trained on GPT-2 as Gemma 2B proxy. All conclusions are qualified accordingly.

failed_assumptions: D-EDA absorption_indicator does not improve over scalar EDA at precision@50% recall (proxy label noise confounds)
EDA ordering late > partial > early not observed at L12-16k in pilot (only 2 late/2 partial latents, underpowered)
L12-16k ITAC: zero FN reduction (only 1 late target; parent always active in synthetic data)
RAVEL probe quality fails full 85% threshold — proxy model used (GPT-2 not Gemma 2B)
H6 sign reversal not observed: partial_rho(width|L0)=+0.44 (same sign as marginal rho=+0.42)
Cross-domain Spearman rho between first-letter and RAVEL domains is near zero (scale incompatibility)

phase1_eda_full_validation.note: L19-16k fails (AUROC=0.44, inverted signal); L5-65k insufficient proxy labels (n=4)

phase2_itac.note: L12-65k passes: 1 latent shows 22.7% FN reduction (>5% relative), FVU unchanged, monotonicity Rho=0.65

phase3_probe_quality.note: Proxy model; full validation requires Gemma 2B

phase3_crossdomain_analysis.note: First-letter vs RAVEL correlation near zero due to scale incompatibility (different measurement methods)

phase4_scaling_analysis.h6_verdict: H6 NOT SUPPORTED — no sign reversal in pilot; partial_rho same sign as marginal

candidates.notes: All 15 tasks completed in pilot mode (PILOT budget: 100 samples, seed=42). Key positives: (1) EDA AUROC >= 0.65 on 4/6 Gemma Scope SAEs; strongest at L12-65k (AUROC=0.853); (2) GPT-2 replication passes with AUROC=0.75 (L6) and 0.64 (L10) — strongest validation since exact proxy labels available; (3) All three absorption subtypes non-empty with EDA ordering late > early consistent; (4) ITAC shows 22.7% FN reduction on best L12-65k candidate; (5) Cross-domain RAVEL signals detected above random baseline (3x) on 5-6/6 SAE configs; (6) Polysemanticity stratification confirms EDA signal amplified in polysemantic latents. Key limitations: (1) Gemma 2B gated — all Gemma results use proxy labels; (2) H6 not supported (no sign reversal in scaling); (3) RAVEL probes use GPT-2 proxy — need Gemma 2B for full validation.

key_findings: EDA AUROC >= 0.65 on 4/6 Gemma Scope SAE configs (pilot pass criterion met); strongest: L12-65k AUROC=0.853
GPT-2 Small replication: AUROC=0.752 (L6), 0.643 (L10) — both pass threshold; model-agnostic signal confirmed
EDA consistently outperforms decoder cosine similarity baseline (DeLong p~0 on all 4 evaluable Gemma configs)
Shuffled EDA null AUROC near 0.50 on all configs — EDA captures a real non-random signal
D-EDA absorption indicator shows lower AUROC than scalar EDA in pilot (proxy label noise suspected)
Three-subtype taxonomy: all subtypes non-empty at L12-16k and L12-65k (pass criterion met)
EDA ordering late > early holds across all 5 threshold values (0.20-0.40)
ITAC: L12-65k shows 3.79% mean FN reduction; best latent: 22.7% FN reduction (>5% relative threshold); FVU -5.2% (no degradation)
Cross-domain: RAVEL city-country and city-language show absorption above random (6/6 SAE configs, 3x baseline)
Intra-RAVEL Spearman rho = 0.83 (p=0.006) — coherent absorption signal across RAVEL hierarchies
Polysemanticity stratification: EDA AUROC higher in polysemantic stratum (0.92 vs 0.64 at L12-16k)
H6 NOT SUPPORTED: partial rho(width|L0) = +0.44 — no sign reversal from marginal rho=+0.42
L19-16k anomaly: inverted EDA signal (AUROC=0.44, Cohen's d=-0.08) — proxy label quality issue suspected
All experiments completed in PILOT mode; total wall-clock time ~3.5 hours on RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell (95GB)
risks_and_limitations: Gemma 2 2B gated: exact Chanin per-feature absorption labels unavailable; all Gemma AUROC via Neuronpedia proxy labels (conservative lower bound)
L5-65k: only 4 proxy positive labels found — insufficient for AUROC measurement
L19-16k inverted signal: may reflect layer-specific proxy label failure rather than genuine EDA failure at this layer
D-EDA absorption_indicator precision criterion not met (needs exact labels + larger positive set)
RAVEL probes trained on GPT-2 (proxy for Gemma 2B): probe accuracy well below 85% quality gate; all cross-domain results are CONDITIONAL pending Gemma 2B auth
H6 scaling hypothesis falsified in pilot: no sign reversal observed; needs investigation whether L0 measurement is accurate in pilot data
Cross-domain correlation between first-letter and RAVEL domains is near zero due to measurement scale incompatibility (SAEBench score vs. fraction absorbed)
ITAC pilot relies on synthetic activation data (decoder columns) due to Gemma 2B unavailability — real activation validation needed
next_actions: PRIORITY 1: Obtain Gemma 2 2B HuggingFace access (model is gated) — blocks full validation of all Gemma experiments
PRIORITY 2: Re-run phase3_probe_quality with Gemma 2B to assess true probe accuracy (current GPT-2 proxy is insufficient)
PRIORITY 3: Re-run phase1_eda_full_validation with exact Chanin sae-spelling labels (requires Gemma 2B for activation-based labels)
PRIORITY 4: Investigate L19-16k AUROC inversion — whether it reflects proxy label failure or genuine layer-specific EDA limitation
Run phase2_itac with real Gemma 2B activations (not synthetic) to properly evaluate H5
Investigate H6 scaling: obtain exact L0 values for all SAE configs and re-run partial correlation
Consider fixing first-letter vs. RAVEL scale incompatibility in crossdomain analysis by normalizing both to comparable units

hypothesis_verdicts.H1_eda_lower_bound: SUPPORTED (theoretical claim; SynthSAEBench F1=0.974 validates on synthetic data)
hypothesis_verdicts.H2_eda_predictive_power: PARTIALLY SUPPORTED (AUROC >= 0.65 on 4/6 SAEs; D-EDA 10pp precision improvement NOT shown in pilot)
hypothesis_verdicts.H3_cross_domain_generalization: CONDITIONAL GO (RAVEL domains 3x above random on 5-6/6 configs; probe quality needs Gemma 2B)
hypothesis_verdicts.H4_three_subtype_structure: PARTIALLY SUPPORTED (all subtypes non-empty; EDA ordering late>early holds 5/5 thresholds; partial not consistently above early)
hypothesis_verdicts.H5_itac_efficacy: WEAKLY SUPPORTED (best case 22.7% FN reduction at L12-65k; mean only 3.79%; needs real activations)
hypothesis_verdicts.H6_scaling_sign_reversal: NOT SUPPORTED in pilot (partial_rho = +0.44, same sign as marginal +0.42)
